_purpose: Per-photographer audit log of sources used by admin/sourcing.py. Records: photographer name, Flickr account, license-claim consistency, spot-check date and outcome. NO PHOTOGRAPHER IS 'TRUSTED' WITHOUT INDIVIDUAL verify-* PER PHOTO — this log is confidence calibration, not a shortcut for verification.
_policy: Per Rule D of admin/SOURCING_HARDENING_PLAN_2026-05-12.md: every 5 commits from the same photographer, pick 1 random other photo from their feed and Read-verify the subject matches the photographer's claimed pattern. If it doesn't, deprecate.

samples.title: Seamens Monument, Isafjordur
samples.notes: Bronze sculpture of two fishermen pulling net; plaque at base; mountain at left consistent with Isafjordur Westfjords town

samples.title: Parliament in Reykjavik
samples.notes: Alpingishusid (Parliament 1881) basalt-block civic building with Reykjavik Cathedral clock-tower beside it on Austurvollur square

samples.title: Akureyri
samples.notes: Traditional Akureyri wooden house in foreground; town descending to Eyjafjordur fjord; cruise ships in port; snow patches on opposite ridge

spot_checks.overall: 3 of 3 subjects match David Stanley's claimed titles. License consistent. Confidence: continue using as a source, but every individual photo still runs through verify-flickr — no shortcuts.
